text.message: was wondering if someone would do that, interesting game oj

i think oj is the target
green is going to hit me all game regardless
ohh no green hit oj rn
you have a city and I have no ore
and green blocks me all game bc he is a sore los3r lol, so red and I can hit you and it will even out
its true, you've solo'd me most of the game when im not even winning lol
i think he soloed you mainly when you were winning
plus not many other places to hit
you might need to take a break from the internet after this one
i think im probably okay green lol
an online catan game on the internet is not the place to be losing my mind, im just calling it how i see it lol
definitely some usa nutjob in him
it s just a game guys :D
green can I give you brick so you get road?
that is gg i assume for oj
nah it doesnt matter he is at 8 cards lol

but im the usa nutjob huh
now you re just being a child
